prompt: We ran the benchmark on three different models: GPT-4o, Claude 3.5 Sonnet, and Gemini 1.5 Pro. I have the stats JSON for all three at /tmp/eval_data/multi_model_stats.json. Please generate a comparison table and a bar chart figure showing QA pass rate, Tier 1 success rate, and correct patch rate for each model. The figures should be ACL-compliant.

assertions.description: A multi-model LaTeX comparison table is created
All three models (GPT-4o, Claude 3.5 Sonnet, Gemini) appear in the table
The best value in at least one column is bolded with \textbf{}
A matplotlib figure script is written and/or a figure file is generated
Output mentions color-blind safe palette (Wong) or uses specific hex codes from it
